item.name: Satrap's Whisper
item.description:
Almost invisible is this jellyfish as it floats serenely through the seas.

[Suitable for printing on small canvases.]

fish.guide: A jellyfish that glides through the seas subtly as a susurrus. Its cloud-like form calls to mind the satrap's residence, Meghaduta─and if ever Radz–at–Han's ruler needed a messenger, it would surely make for a stunning one.
